layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-12 for cards. py-24 for marketing sections.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Bento Grid strategy (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, gap-8) for featured domains.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-6) for Admin Panel.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Sticky at top z-50.
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism Tactile/Glass hybrid. bg-[#121212] border border-white/10. Hover: -translate-y-1, border-[#D4AF37]/50, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(212,175,55,0.1)].
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F1C40F] font-semibold. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5.
surface_strategies.modals: Solid background #0A0A0A with 1px border-white/10. Blurred overlay bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm.

components_and_libraries.ui_components: Shadcn UI (Customized heavily for dark mode luxury).
components_and_libraries.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37].
components_and_libraries.tables: Shadcn Table for Admin domain list. Flush borders, dense padding.

hero_background.description: Dynamic abstract blue/dark tech pattern. Use with heavy bg-black/70 overlay so text is readable.

alternative_luxury_texture.description: Textured black fabric pattern. Use for subtle background noise in feature sections.

broker_portrait.description: Professional confident businessman portrait for the Contact/About Broker section.

features_and_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, modales). Use kebab-case role-based naming.
features_and_rules.hover_states: MANDATORY. Text contrast must increase on hover. Use explicit hover text colors.
features_and_rules.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text. Focus rings must be visible (focus:ring-[#D4AF37]).
features_and_rules.domain_cards: Display Domain Name (large, Cabinet Grotesk), Tags (e.g., 'Premium', 'Tech'), Metrics (Traffic/Length), and Price (or 'Make Offer' button).
features_and_rules.admin_panel: JWT Auth protected. Must include standard dashboard layouts (Sidebar + Main Content). Add/Edit/Delete actions for domains. View Offers table.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON thoroughly. The design direction is 'Dark Luxury Tech' (Archetype 5).
Use .js and .jsx files for the React frontend. DO NOT use .ts or .tsx files.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for backgrounds, use #050505.
Do NOT use purple or teal. Use Champagne Gold (#D4AF37) as the primary CTA color.
Implement the landing page with a Bento grid for featured domains and a searchable list for the full portfolio.
Ensure the 'Request Price / Make Offer' feature opens a Shadcn Dialog modal.
Build a secure Admin panel (JWT) that manages the domains list and captures offers.
Use the provided image URLs. Do NOT use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
Ensure the navigation header is sticky with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60).
All buttons and forms MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Use Tailwind CSS for styling and Radix UI / Shadcn UI components for complex interactive elements.
